name: IAM: Gaming Expo
short_description: A gaming expo with character — playground, B2B meet-ups, industry talks, tournaments, board games, cosplay, and live music in Elgin.
description: IAM:GE is designed to be an expo with character. Expect a full gaming playground, B2B meet-ups, industry talks, tournaments, board games and tabletop sessions, plus a splash of cosplay and live music. It's a space for creators, players, and industry folk to come together and actually do things, not just walk around. The deadline for submissions is the 1st July 2026.
